work.title: [Profile Avatar] Delete button mask remains circular around square button
work.body:
![viewport-screenshot.png](https://api.devrev.ai/internal/artifacts.download?id=don%3Acore%3Advrv-us-1%3Adevo%2F0%3Aartifact%2F13954602)

The profile avatar delete control has a circular outer mask while its child delete button is square-rounded.
